summary: Implemented SiteRegistry read-model derivation in site-config with typed projection interfaces, deterministic event grouping, freshness/provenance preservation, conflict representation, projection-only authority limits, and fixture-backed tests for the 1403 schema plus stale/conflicting signals.
residuals: Cloudflare aggregate SiteRegistry endpoint integration remains later work.
The read model remains projection-only; authority-bearing registry mutation requires separate admitted work.
